reviews.review_description: i bought the game about a year and a half ago and it wasnt everything that i had imagined it would be and now i hardly ever play it so now i'm just asking for my refund back
Love being in the driver's seat. I feel like I'm actually driving in Mario cart. Such a fun game!!!

This is a fun, bright racing game i suggest for calm players on vr. It’s not as fast as the other racing games on quest 2, but I still recommend it. The boost system is not the best when it comes to limitation, I think it at least could charge up over time. This is a good stay in position kind of game, and i recommend the game.

Read a lot of really bad reviews. Motion sickness. Also it not being Mario kart.  

Yes the first time made me dizzy. But after that nothing.  

No it's not Mario kart. Nothing will be. 

Lack of weapons and upgrades doesn't help.

Needs more maps. Weapons and upgrades. 

Online is non existent.  Need to sort out making private game modes. 

But overall. A good fun game. Hopefully an update will come.
Almost threw up after 5 minutes. If you get car sick, you will probably not like this
How the hell did I download this without knowing
Very slow game don't go fast you can't make it go fast. Don't like it
Love this game. Easy to learn no control issues no motion sickness no blurry background. Kinda of reminds me of another game i played. Maps are simple id like to see them jazz it up a bit.
Brought this and it’s so nothing  been on better don’t buy it waste of money
Can’t play this it made me dizzy so it’s a no for me.

So when i first played this game the controls worked but every time since I'm unable to drive, my hands are on the floor and unable to steer, iv tried many things to sort it, without any luck, it's a good thing the game is cheap
Try and figure out multi player. It’s impossible. Steering with gestures doesn’t work either. I will be getting a refund.

This game doesn’t cooperate well with controlling and I would like to refund my purchase as I do not want anymore game time on it. It was purchased today 12/26/21 and was played for less then 3 minutes. I want a refund but i don’t know how
Sub part controls, zero online presence. Just a very weak presentation and execution. Not worth any price honestly.
If you’re looking for some crap to buy, then you’ve come to the right place... I give this one a big ole NOPE
Motion sickness is the most you get out of this game. The tutorial is rushed and overall the game is a waste of money.

Love the idea of Mario kart racing with mates but agree with many reviews, it does feel a little slow. But the biggest turn off is the wall collision spin. It had even our hard corest players with headaches after a few races.

reviews.review_title: no good tracking and motion sickness
reviews.review_description: The joysticks tracked badly and once I got the kart going… Instant MAJOR motion sickness which lasted a hour or two.
Don't like this game at all and I can't figure out how to get a refund for it
It needs a lot too really be good tbh . Just get V speedway
